title: VQLS
description: Variational Quantum Linear Solver for solving linear systems Ax = b using variational optimization. Works with A = c₀A₀ + c₁A₁ + c₂A₂.

params.help: Coefficients for the built-in three-term linear combination of unitaries (c0, c1, c2). Provide exactly three values in [0, 1].
params.name: coefficients

params.help: Maximum number of classical optimization iterations for parameter tuning.
params.name: max_iterations

params.help: Optimization convergence tolerance. Stops when cost function change is below this threshold.
params.name: tolerance
